meaning: there is little chance that something will happen — probably will not
anchorSentence: This fix is unlikely to work without restarting the server.
collocations: seem unlikely to / appear unlikely to
notes: be unlikely to is the negative counterpart of be likely to (~20-30% certainty). Do not confuse with will not — be unlikely to leaves open the small possibility. More formal than probably not.
recallQuestions: be unlikely to 的确定程度大约是多少？
be unlikely to 和 will not 有什么区别？
用 be unlikely to 写一句和你的工作或学习有关的句子。
